contextual.title: Assessment of Cough and Wheeze With Breath Sound Documenting Device
contextual.text:
Summary: The study goal is to create a database of respiratory sounds recordings, to evaluate and validate the WIM technology and to evaluate the efficacy of a specific treatment by comparing the severity of the respiratory symptoms before and after the administration of the treatment.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Patient and/or parents/guardian signed informed consent 

 Patients with cough or shortness of breath 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Chest tubes 

 Skin lesions precluding attachment of sensors 

 Respiratory distress 

 Pregnant women

metadata.brief_title: Assessment of Cough and Wheeze With Breath Sound Documenting Device
drugs_list: PulmoTrack® 2010 with WIM-PC™ and WIM-CC™ Technologies
